text:
c.
4-5. If all the malefics be with strength, while benefics be bereft of it, one of the Viyoni (Viyoni
Rasis are Rasis other than Gemini, Virgo, Libra, Aquarius and the first half of Sagittarius) be
Signs ascending with Mercury and Saturn be in Angles, or in aspect to the Ascendant, the
birth will be of a creature other than human being. The birth will correspond to the
Dwadasamsa of the Ascendant, or of the Moon prevailing at Adhana, or in the radix.
6-9. The sages have explained the hue, form etc. of the manifold births based on planetary
conjunctions and aspects, which I narrate below. The Zodiac personified signifies the several
limbs of non-human species, as under: Aries face, Taurus neck, Gemini and Pisces
shoulders and forelegs, Cancer and Aquarius back, Leo and Capricorn forelegs, Virgo and
Sagittarius hind legs, Libra anus and Scorpio tail and genital organ. The right side limbs are
denoted by Signs Gemini to Libra, while left side by Signs Scorpio to Pisces.
10-12.
